allow: Bash(cmd /c "tasklist /fi \\"PID eq 36068\\" /fo list && tasklist /fi \\"PID eq 6044\\" /fo list")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=36068 get Name,CommandLine 2>&1")
Bash(cmd /c "wmic process where ProcessId=6044 get Name,CommandLine 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id 36068 | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle; Get-Process -Id 6044 | Select-Object Name, Id, MainWindowTitle")
